overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a futuristic urban environment at dusk. The clip begins with a view of a neon-lit intersection featuring the 'TURBO' building, then transitions to a third-person perspective following a character walking through wet streets, crossing intersections, and entering covered commercial walkways beneath elevated highways.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection beneath elevated highways

events.description: futuristic purple car drives through the intersection crosswalk
screen fades to black, transitioning to a new location

agents.ego_description: standing at the intersection observing traffic and the surrounding neon-lit buildings including the TURBO building

notable_agents.action: futuristic purple car driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: large curved building with illuminated TURBO signage in orange and blue neon
multi-level highway structure crossing above the intersection with glowing support pillars
broad pedestrian crossing with thick yellow stripes reflecting on wet asphalt
building facade with prominent magenta and purple neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a futuristic urban intersection at dusk, dominated by the TURBO building's neon signage and elevated highways overhead. The camera pans across the wet asphalt reflecting pink and cyan lights as a purple futuristic car drives through the crosswalk. The environment is cyberpunk aesthetic with glass and steel architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway with neon storefronts

events.description: fade from black reveals third-person perspective following a character in a red jacket
passing by illuminated vending machines and benches along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian wearing a bright red jacket along the wet sidewalk under the elevated highway

notable_agents.action: character in red jacket walking steadily ahead of the camera

entered.detail: purple neon sign reading XPOR on the building facade
futuristic benches with glowing cyan accents lining the sidewalk
illuminated vending machines with pink and blue lighting
massive concrete and steel highway overpass creating a canopy overhead

segments.scene_description: Following a fade from black, the perspective shifts to third-person following a character in a red jacket walking along a wet sidewalk beneath an elevated highway. The area is illuminated by neon signs including a prominent XPOR sign and glowing vending machines. The concrete sidewalk reflects the pink and cyan lights from the surrounding cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing

events.description: arriving at crosswalk and waiting for the traffic light to change
traffic light changes to green walk signal, beginning to cross the street
cars pass through the intersection as the group crosses the street

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then crossing the street with a group of pedestrians while traffic passes by

notable_agents.action: black car stopped at the crosswalk waiting for pedestrians to pass

entered.detail: large building with prominent white NOARCHI signage and curved neon light strips
tall pole with traffic signals and street signs showing red and green lights
yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a busy intersection dominated by the NOARCHI building with its distinctive white signage. After waiting for the traffic light, the group crosses the street as cars pass through. The crosswalk features bold yellow stripes, and the area transitions from the covered sidewalk to an open intersection with visible sky and approaching elevated ramps.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with shops and neon advertisements

events.description: entering the covered walkway beneath the building overhang
passing by piles of trash bags and debris in the corner of the underpass

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered commercial area passing other pedestrians and illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive green hair walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: low concrete ceiling with fluorescent strip lighting creating a tunnel-like effect
storefronts with glowing windows and neon signage including a visible AO BA sign
accumulated garbage bags and debris stacked against the wall in the underpass corner

segments.scene_description: After crossing the street, the character enters a covered commercial walkway beneath an overpass. The area features shop fronts with bright neon signage, including an AO BA banner, while piles of trash are visible in the corners. The lighting shifts to artificial fluorescent strips overhead, and the character passes a pedestrian with green hair walking in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a neon-drenched cyberpunk city at dusk, moving from a wide urban intersection into the claustrophobic depths of a covered commercial walkway. It begins with a pan across wet asphalt reflecting pink and cyan lights beneath the towering TURBO building and elevated highways as a purple futuristic car glides through the frame. The perspective then shifts to follow a character in a red jacket walking along a rain-slicked sidewalk illuminated by glowing vending machines and a prominent XPOR sign. As the character reaches a busy intersection, the scene opens up to reveal the white signage of the NOARCHI building and bold yellow crosswalks before the group navigates through passing traffic. Finally, the camera follows the character beneath an overpass into a covered walkway, where the open sky is replaced by artificial fluorescent strips and bright neon shop banners amidst cluttered urban debris.
